contents.text: This datapack combines the classic Skyblock with MMO elements, grind mechanics, and a ton of custom content.

The version you're playing is a development version; you should expect bugs, errors, missing features, or placeholders. Even though versions are released as stably as possible on Modrinth, updating to a new version of the pack may still corrupt an old save file under certain circumstances!

As a player, you have access to a player menu (default key: “G”). This menu gives you an overview of your stats, includes a teleport feature, and will prove very useful to you as the game progresses. 
 You'll also find an in-game wiki there that provides an overview of features, systems, mechanics, and items. It's worth checking back there from time to time.
[WIP] Some texts and features are still in development and will be revised during the testing phase.
